xss_basic.title: XSS Basics
xss_basic.description: In this lab, the application has a Reflected XSS vulnerability. Find a way to inject JavaScript that reads document.cookie.

hints.1: Try entering regular HTML tags in the search field to see if they are reflected on the page.
hints.2: Use a <script> tag with alert() to confirm code execution.
